chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza C.P. No. D – 6116 of 2025 [Sheikh Muhammad Ahsan Ellahi v. Governor Sindh & others] Petitioner: Sheikh Muhamamd Ahsan Ashan Ellahi son of Sheikh Muhammad Suleman, through Mr. Ahmed Ali Ghumro, Advocate. Date of hearing: 19-12-2025 Date of decision: 19-12-2025 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. – 1] Urgency granted. 3] Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 2, 4-5] Grievance of the Petitioner is against an order passed by the Provincial Ombudsman under the Establishment of the Office of Ombudsman for the Province of Sindh Act, 1991, whereby the Sindh Building Control Authority has been directed to take necessary action against the unauthorized construction made by the Petitioner in his shop. Counsel submits that the order passed was on a complaint filed by Respondent No.6, with whom the Petitioner has a civil dispute. Be that as it may, since the Petitioner has already availed the statutory remedy by making a representation before the Governor against the order of the Ombudsman, we are not inclined to interfere in the matter at this stage. Therefore, the petition is dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE SHABAN*
